                  _diff_compare PROC
;;;665    
;;;666    static BOOL _diff_compare(UINT16 a, UINT16 b)
000000  4602              MOV      r2,r0
;;;667    {
;;;668        UINT16 u16diff = (a > b) ? a - b : b - a;

000004  dd01              BLE      |L1.10|
000006  1a50              SUBS     r0,r2,r1
000008  e000              B        |L1.12|
                  |L1.10|
00000a  1a88              SUBS     r0,r1,r2
                  |L1.12|
00000c  b283              UXTH     r3,r0
;;;669        return (u16diff < 10)?TRUE:FALSE;
00000e  2b0a              CMP      r3,#0xa
000010  da01              BGE      |L1.22|
000012  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L1.20|
;;;670    }
000014  4770              BX       lr

0000da  493f              LDR      r1,|L3.472|

0000e4  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]

0000ec  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;204        g_bFirstStartupFlag[u8Dev][3] = TRUE;

0000f4  70c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#3]

000110  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
000114  80c8              STRH     r0,[r1,#6]
;;;210    }
000116  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000118  bdf0              POP      {r4-r7,pc}
;;;211    
                          ENDP

                          AREA ||i._timing_compare||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  _timing_compare PROC
;;;671    
;;;672    static BOOL _timing_compare(HDMI_VIDEO_TIMING_T *pstTiming1, HDMI_VIDEO_TIMING_T *pstTiming2)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;673    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;674        if (pstTiming1->u8_polarity == pstTiming2->u8_polarity &&
000006  7820              LDRB     r0,[r4,#0]
000008  7829              LDRB     r1,[r5,#0]
00000a  4288              CMP      r0,r1
00000c  d134              BNE      |L4.120|
;;;675            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_htotal,   pstTiming2->u16_htotal) &&
00000e  8869              LDRH     r1,[r5,#2]
000010  8860              LDRH     r0,[r4,#2]
000012  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
000016  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000018  d02e              BEQ      |L4.120|
;;;676            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_vtotal,   pstTiming2->u16_vtotal) &&
00001a  88a9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#4]
00001c  88a0              LDRH     r0,[r4,#4]
00001e  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
000022  b348              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;677            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_hactive, pstTiming2->u16_hactive) &&
000024  88e9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#6]
000026  88e0              LDRH     r0,[r4,#6]
000028  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
00002c  b320              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;678            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_vactive, pstTiming2->u16_vactive) &&
00002e  8929              LDRH     r1,[r5,#8]
000030  8920              LDRH     r0,[r4,#8]
000032  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
000036  b1f8              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;679            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_pixclk,   pstTiming2->u16_pixclk) &&
000038  8969              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0xa]
00003a  8960              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0xa]
00003c  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
000040  b1d0              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;680            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_vfreq, pstTiming2->u16_vfreq) &&
000042  89a9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0xc]
000044  89a0              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0xc]
000046  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
00004a  b1a8              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;681            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_hoffset, pstTiming2->u16_hoffset) &&
00004c  89e9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0xe]
00004e  89e0              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0xe]
000050  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
000054  b180              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;682            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_voffset, pstTiming2->u16_voffset) &&
000056  8a29              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0x10]
000058  8a20              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x10]
00005a  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
00005e  b158              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;683            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_hsyncwidth,   pstTiming2->u16_hsyncwidth) &&
000060  8a69              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0x12]
000062  8a60              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x12]
000064  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
000068  b130              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;684            _diff_compare(pstTiming1->u16_vsyncwidth,   pstTiming2->u16_vsyncwidth))
00006a  8aa9              LDRH     r1,[r5,#0x14]
00006c  8aa0              LDRH     r0,[r4,#0x14]
00006e  f7fffffe          BL       _diff_compare
000072  b108              CBZ      r0,|L4.120|
;;;685        {
;;;686            return TRUE;
000074  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
                  |L4.118|
;;;687        }
;;;688        else
;;;689        {
;;;690            return FALSE;
;;;691        }
;;;692    }
000076  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L4.120|
000078  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;690
00007a  e7fc              B        |L4.118|
;;;693    
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i._tx_csc_cfg||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _tx_csc_cfg PROC
;;;248    
;;;249    static VOID _tx_csc_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_txcsc_id)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;250    {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000004  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;251        g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id].u8_sel = g_u8_csc_idx[g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT[u8_txcsc_id]];

000008  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00000a  492f              LDR      r1,|L5.200|

00000e  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000012  4a2e              LDR      r2,|L5.204|
000014  eb0201c1          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #3
000018  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
00001c  f8010012          STRB     r0,[r1,r2,LSL #1]
;;;252    //    api_csc_tx_instance_init(&g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id], u8_txcsc_id);
;;;253        api_csc_tx_instance_init(&g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id], g_u8_csc_idx[g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT[u8_txcsc_id]]);

000024  4b29              LDR      r3,|L5.204|
000026  eb0302c2          ADD      r2,r3,r2,LSL #3
00002a  eb040344          ADD      r3,r4,r4,LSL #1
00002e  eb020043          ADD      r0,r2,r3,LSL #1
000032  4a24              LDR      r2,|L5.196|

000038  5c99              LDRB     r1,[r3,r2]

;;;254        g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id].st_csc_config_param.csc_in_color_range = CHIP_INTERNAL_PROCESS_COLORRANGE;
00003e  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
000040  eb050045          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #1
000044  4a21              LDR      r2,|L5.204|
000046  eb0200c0          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #3

00004e  eb000042          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSL #1

000054  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000056  eb050045          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #1
00005a  4a1c              LDR      r2,|L5.204|
00005c  eb0200c0          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #3
000060  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
000064  eb000042          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSL #1
000068  7101              STRB     r1,[r0,#4]
;;;256        g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id].st_csc_config_param.u8_pixel_repeat  = HDMI_PIXEL_REPEAT_X1;
00006a  eb050045          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #1
00006e  4a17              LDR      r2,|L5.204|

000078  eb000042          ADD      r0,r0,r2,LSL #1
00007c  7141              STRB     r1,[r0,#5]
;;;257        g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id].st_csc_config_param.csc_in_colorspace =  CHIP_INTERNAL_PROCESS_COLORSPACE;
00007e  2002              MOVS     r0,#2

000092  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
;;;258        g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id].st_csc_config_param.csc_out_colorspace = CHIP_TX_CSC_OUT_COLORSPACE;

;;;259        api_csc_tx_set(&g_st_txcsc_dev[u8Dev][u8_txcsc_id]);

;;;260    }

;;;261    
                          ENDP

                  _video_misc_process PROC
;;;550    
;;;551    VOID _video_misc_process(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_rx_id)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;552    {
000004  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000006  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;553        UINT8 u8_vipss_id = 0;
000008  bf00              NOP      
;;;554        UINT8 u8_vipss_mapping = 0;
00000a  2700              MOVS     r7,#0
;;;555        BOOL  bSetVipssCscFlag = MS_FALSE;
00000c  46b8              MOV      r8,r7
;;;556    
;;;557        //require positive polarity input
;;;558        g_st_rx_polarity[u8Dev][u8_rx_id].u8_chan = g_u8_misc_module_rx[g_u8_HDMI_RX_PROT[u8_rx_id]];

000010  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
000012  49f3              LDR      r1,|L6.992|

000016  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1
00001a  4af2              LDR      r2,|L6.996|
00001c  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
000020  eb050245          ADD      r2,r5,r5,LSL #1
000024  5488              STRB     r0,[r1,r2]
;;;559        switch(g_stVideo_HDMIRx_Timing[u8Dev][u8_rx_id].u8_polarity)
000026  eb040044          ADD      r0,r4,r4,LSL #1
00002a  eb0000c4          ADD      r0,r0,r4,LSL #3
00002e  49ee              LDR      r1,|L6.1000|
000030  eb0100c0          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #3
000034  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000038  eb0101c5          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #3
00003c  f8100011          LDRB     r0,[r0,r1,LSL #1]
000040  2808              CMP      r0,#8
000042  d25b              BCS      |L6.252|
000044  e8dff000          TBB      [pc,r0]
000048  05041a19          DCB      0x05,0x04,0x1a,0x19
00004c  302f4645          DCB      0x30,0x2f,0x46,0x45
;;;560        {
;;;561            case ProgrVNegHNeg:
;;;562            case InterVNegHNeg:

;;;563                g_st_rx_polarity[u8Dev][u8_rx_id].u8_hsync_flip_en  = MS_TRUE;

000058  4ae2              LDR      r2,|L6.996|

00005e  eb050245          ADD      r2,r5,r5,LSL #1
000062  4411              ADD      r1,r1,r2
000064  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
;;;564                g_st_rx_polarity[u8Dev][u8_rx_id].u8_vsync_flip_en  = MS_TRUE;

00006a  4ade              LDR      r2,|L6.996|

000074  4411              ADD      r1,r1,r2
000076  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;565                break;
000078  e040              B        |L6.252|
;;;566            case ProgrVNegHPos:
;;;567            case InterVNegHPos:
00007a  bf00              NOP      
;;;568                g_st_rx_polarity[u8Dev][u8_rx_id].u8_hsync_flip_en  = MS_FALSE;

00007e  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1

;;;574                g_st_rx_polarity[u8Dev][u8_rx_id].u8_vsync_flip_en  = MS_FALSE;

;;;575                break;
0000d0  e014              B        |L6.252|
;;;576            case ProgrVPosHPos:
;;;577            case InterVPosHPos:

0000f8  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;580                break;
0000fa  bf00              NOP

0000fc  bf00              NOP                            ;565
;;;581        }
;;;582        api_misc_rx_polarity_cfg(&g_st_rx_polarity[u8Dev][u8_rx_id]);

000102  4ab8              LDR      r2,|L6.996|

00010c  1888              ADDS     r0,r1,r2

                          AREA ||i._video_mute||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_mute PROC
;;;435    
;;;436    VOID _video_mute(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_path, BOOL b_mute)
000000  e92d41f0          PUSH     {r4-r8,lr}
;;;437    {
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460e              MOV      r6,r1
000008  4617              MOV      r7,r2
;;;438        UINT8 u8_tx_id;
;;;439    //    LOG("_video_mute[%d] sta:%d\r\n",u8_path,b_mute);
;;;440        if(g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev]== MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT)
00000a  4823              LDR      r0,|L7.152|
00000c  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
00000e  2804              CMP      r0,#4
000010  d104              BNE      |L7.28|
;;;441            _digital_audio_mute(u8Dev,u8_path,b_mute);
000012  463a              MOV      r2,r7
000014  4631              MOV      r1,r6
000016  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000018  f7fffffe          BL       _digital_audio_mute

                  _video_port_hdmi_tx_driver_config PROC
;;;339    
;;;340    VOID _video_port_hdmi_tx_driver_config(UINT8 u8Dev,u8 u8_tx_id)

                          AREA ||i._video_port_hdmi_tx_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_port_hdmi_tx_init PROC
;;;359    }
;;;360    VOID _video_port_hdmi_tx_init(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;361    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;362        UINT8 u8_tx_id = 0;
000004  bf00              NOP      
;;;363        gst_inf_pack[u8Dev].st_avi_infoframe.u8_pixel_repeat =  HDMI_PIXEL_REPEAT_X1;
000006  2100              MOVS     r1,#0

00000e  eb020040          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #1
000012  75c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0x17]
;;;364        gst_inf_pack[u8Dev].st_avi_infoframe.e_scan_mode =  HDMI_SCAN_MODE_OVERSCAN;
000014  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000016  202b              MOVS     r0,#0x2b
000018  4360              MULS     r0,r4,r0
00001a  eb020040          ADD      r0,r2,r0,LSL #1
00001e  72c1              STRB     r1,[r0,#0xb]
;;;365        gst_inf_pack[u8Dev].st_avi_infoframe.e_picture_aspect = HDMI_PICTURE_ASPECT_16_9;
000020  2102              MOVS     r1,#2

                          DCD      g_u8_HDMI_TX_PROT
                  |L10.948|
                          DCD      g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing
                  |L10.952|
                          DCD      g_u8_output_index
                  |L10.956|
                          DCD      g_arrOutputTable
                  |L10.960|
                          DCD      g_u8TxFormat
                  |L10.964|
                          DCD      hdmi_tx_edid
                  |L10.968|
                          DCD      u8_tx_ksv_buf
                  |L10.972|
                          DCD      u8_tx_key_buf
                  |L10.976|
                          DCD      g_hdmi_edid_flag
                  |L10.980|
                          DCD      g_st_tx_mux
                  |L10.984|
                          DCD      g_st_vovehc

                          AREA ||i._video_rx_process||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_rx_process PROC
;;;752    
;;;753    static VOID _video_rx_process(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_rx_idx)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;754    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
000004  460d              MOV      r5,r1
;;;755        UINT8 u8_tx_id = 0;
000006  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;756    
;;;757    //    LOG("[INFO] hdmi%d b_audio_pll_manu_cfg = %d\r\n", u8_rx_idx,g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx].b_audio_pll_manu_cfg);
;;;758    
;;;759        api_hdmi_rx_task(&g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx]);
000008  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
00000c  eb010141          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #1
000010  4af9              LDR      r2,|L11.1016|
000012  eb021181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #6
000016  ebc502c5          RSB      r2,r5,r5,LSL #3
00001a  eb020242          ADD      r2,r2,r2,LSL #1
00001e  eb011002          ADD      r0,r1,r2,LSL #4
000022  f7fffffe          BL       api_hdmi_rx_task
;;;760    
;;;761        if(api_hdmi_rx_is_audio_changed(&g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx]))
000026  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
00002a  eb010141          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #1
00002e  4af2              LDR      r2,|L11.1016|
000030  eb021181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #6
000034  ebc502c5          RSB      r2,r5,r5,LSL #3
000038  eb020242          ADD      r2,r2,r2,LSL #1
00003c  eb011002          ADD      r0,r1,r2,LSL #4
000040  f7fffffe          BL       api_hdmi_rx_is_audio_changed
000044  b118              CBZ      r0,|L11.78|
;;;762        {
;;;763            LOG("[INFO] hdmi%d audio change\r\n", u8_rx_idx);
000046  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000048  a0ec              ADR      r0,|L11.1020|
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
                  |L11.78|
;;;764    #if 0
;;;765            for(u8_tx_id = 0; u8_tx_id < 4; u8_tx_id ++)
;;;766            {
;;;767                if(u8_Tx_audio_sel[u8Dev][u8_tx_id] == u8_rx_idx)
;;;768                {
;;;769                    if(g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id].u8_audio_src == FROM_HDMI_RX_AUDIO)
;;;770                    {
;;;771                        LOG("[INFO] hdmi%d tx audio change\r\n", u8_tx_id);
;;;772                        api_hdmi_tx_audio_mute(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id], MS_TRUE);
;;;773                        memcpy((&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id].st_infoframes_packets.st_audio_infoframe), &g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx].st_packets_infoframes.st_audio_infoframe, sizeof(HDMI_AUDIO_INFOFRAME_T));
;;;774                        api_hdmi_tx_audio_change(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id]);
;;;775    //                    if(g_bFirstStartupFlag[u8Dev][u8_tx_id] == FALSE)
;;;776                            api_hdmi_tx_audio_mute(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id], b_audio_mute[u8Dev][u8_tx_id]);
;;;777                    }
;;;778                }
;;;779            }
;;;780    #endif
;;;781        }
;;;782    
;;;783        if(api_hdmi_rx_is_video_changed(&g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx]))
00004e  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
000052  eb010141          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #1
000056  4ae8              LDR      r2,|L11.1016|
000058  eb021181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #6
00005c  ebc502c5          RSB      r2,r5,r5,LSL #3
000060  eb020242          ADD      r2,r2,r2,LSL #1
000064  eb011002          ADD      r0,r1,r2,LSL #4
000068  f7fffffe          BL       api_hdmi_rx_is_video_changed
00006c  2800              CMP      r0,#0
00006e  d07c              BEQ      |L11.362|
;;;784        {
;;;785            LOG("[INFO] hdmi%d video change\r\n", u8_rx_idx);
000070  4629              MOV      r1,r5
000072  a0ea              ADR      r0,|L11.1052|
000074  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
;;;786            _video_mute(u8Dev,u8_rx_idx, TRUE);
000078  2201              MOVS     r2,#1
00007a  4629              MOV      r1,r5
00007c  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00007e  f7fffffe          BL       _video_mute
;;;787            if(api_hdmi_rx_get_video_timing(&g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx]) == MS_ERR_OK)
000082  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
000086  eb010141          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #1
00008a  4adb              LDR      r2,|L11.1016|
00008c  eb021181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #6
000090  ebc502c5          RSB      r2,r5,r5,LSL #3
000094  eb020242          ADD      r2,r2,r2,LSL #1
000098  eb011002          ADD      r0,r1,r2,LSL #4
00009c  f7fffffe          BL       api_hdmi_rx_get_video_timing
0000a0  2800              CMP      r0,#0
0000a2  d17d              BNE      |L11.416|
;;;788            {
;;;789                LOG("[INFO] hdmi%d video timing ok\r\n", u8_rx_idx);
0000a4  4629              MOV      r1,r5
0000a6  a0e5              ADR      r0,|L11.1084|
0000a8  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
;;;790                g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx].b_timing_stable = TRUE;
0000ac  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000ae  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
0000b2  eb010141          ADD      r1,r1,r1,LSL #1
0000b6  4ad0              LDR      r2,|L11.1016|

0000c4  eb011102          ADD      r1,r1,r2,LSL #4
0000c8  71c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#7]
;;;791    
;;;792                if(_timing_compare(&g_stVideo_HDMIRx_Timing[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx],  &(g_st_hdmi_rx[u8Dev][u8_rx_idx].st_rx_video_timing)) == FALSE)
0000ca  ebc402c4          RSB      r2,r4,r4,LSL #3

000102  f7fffffe          BL       _timing_compare

000108  d17d              BNE      |L11.518|
;;;793                {
;;;794                    LOG("[INFO] hdmi%d video timing is different\r\n", u8_rx_idx);

000118  f7fffffe          BL       _video_mute

000afa  4a58              LDR      r2,|L12.3164|
000afc  5d10              LDRB     r0,[r2,r4]            ;1223
000afe  2211              MOVS     r2,#0x11              ;1223
000b00  f7fffffe          BL       mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval
000b04  4631              MOV      r1,r6                 ;1224
000b06  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1224
000b08  f7fffffe          BL       app_single_process
                  |L12.2828|
000b0c  1c70              ADDS     r0,r6,#1              ;1218
000b0e  b2c6              UXTB     r6,r0                 ;1218
                  |L12.2832|

000b12  dbdd              BLT      |L12.2768|
000b14  e015              B        |L12.2882|

000b16  4629              MOV      r1,r5                 ;1230

000b1e  e010              B        |L12.2882|

                          AREA ||i._video_timgen_cfg||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_timgen_cfg PROC
;;;261    
;;;262    VOID _video_timgen_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev,UINT8 u8_timgen_id)
000000  b530              PUSH     {r4,r5,lr}
;;;263    {
000002  b085              SUB      sp,sp,#0x14
000004  4605              MOV      r5,r0
000006  460c              MOV      r4,r1
;;;264        MISC_MODULE_CLK_T st_tmg_src;
;;;265        PLL_DEV_T st_pll_dev;
;;;266        MISC_MODULE_CLK_T st_module_clk;
;;;267    
;;;268        api_misc_timing_get(g_arrOutputTable[g_u8_output_index[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id]],&g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id]);
000008  eb050245          ADD      r2,r5,r5,LSL #1
00000c  eb0202c5          ADD      r2,r2,r5,LSL #3
000010  4b41              LDR      r3,|L13.280|
000012  eb0302c2          ADD      r2,r3,r2,LSL #3
000016  eb040344          ADD      r3,r4,r4,LSL #1
00001a  eb0303c4          ADD      r3,r3,r4,LSL #3
00001e  eb020143          ADD      r1,r2,r3,LSL #1
000022  4a3e              LDR      r2,|L13.284|
000024  eb020285          ADD      r2,r2,r5,LSL #2
000028  5d12              LDRB     r2,[r2,r4]
00002a  4b3d              LDR      r3,|L13.288|
00002c  5c98              LDRB     r0,[r3,r2]
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       api_misc_timing_get
;;;269    
;;;270        st_module_clk.u8_clkdiv = MISC_CLKDIV_1;
000032  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000034  f88d0002          STRB     r0,[sp,#2]
;;;271        st_module_clk.u8_dst_module = MISC_VIDEO_MODULE_PLLV1 + u8_timgen_id ;
000038  f1040027          ADD      r0,r4,#0x27
00003c  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
00003e  f88d0000          STRB     r0,[sp,#0]
;;;272        st_module_clk.u8_src_clk = MISC_CLKSRC_XTAL;
000042  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000044  f88d0001          STRB     r0,[sp,#1]
;;;273        api_misc_pllv_clkin_sel(&st_module_clk);
000048  4668              MOV      r0,sp
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       api_misc_pllv_clkin_sel
;;;274    
;;;275        st_pll_dev.u8_pll_idx = PLLV1 + u8_timgen_id;
00004e  b2e0              UXTB     r0,r4
000050  f88d0004          STRB     r0,[sp,#4]
;;;276        st_pll_dev.b_osc_input = MS_TRUE;
000054  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000056  f88d0005          STRB     r0,[sp,#5]
;;;277        st_pll_dev.u32_clk_out = g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id].u16_pixclk * 10000;
00005a  eb050045          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #1
00005e  eb0000c5          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #3
000062  492d              LDR      r1,|L13.280|
000064  eb0100c0          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #3
000068  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1
00006c  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
000070  eb000041          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #1
000074  8940              LDRH     r0,[r0,#0xa]
000076  f2427110          MOV      r1,#0x2710
00007a  4348              MULS     r0,r1,r0
00007c  9003              STR      r0,[sp,#0xc]
;;;278        api_pll_config(&st_pll_dev);
00007e  a801              ADD      r0,sp,#4
000080  f7fffffe          BL       api_pll_config
;;;279    
;;;280        st_tmg_src.u8_src_clk = MISC_CLKSRC_PLLV1 + u8_timgen_id;
000084  f1040008          ADD      r0,r4,#8
000088  b2c0              UXTB     r0,r0
00008a  f88d0011          STRB     r0,[sp,#0x11]
;;;281        st_tmg_src.u8_dst_module = g_u8_misc_timgen[u8_timgen_id];
00008e  4825              LDR      r0,|L13.292|
000090  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000092  f88d0010          STRB     r0,[sp,#0x10]
;;;282        api_misc_timgen_clkin_sel(&st_tmg_src);
000096  a804              ADD      r0,sp,#0x10
000098  f7fffffe          BL       api_misc_timgen_clkin_sel
;;;283    
;;;284        api_timgen_instance_init(&g_st_timgen[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id], u8_timgen_id);
00009c  4922              LDR      r1,|L13.296|
00009e  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
0000a2  eb0100c4          ADD      r0,r1,r4,LSL #3
0000a6  4621              MOV      r1,r4
0000a8  f7fffffe          BL       api_timgen_instance_init
;;;285        g_st_timgen[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id].u8_workmode =  FreeRun_Mode;
0000ac  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
0000ae  491e              LDR      r1,|L13.296|
0000b0  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
0000b4  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
0000b8  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;286        g_st_timgen[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id].u8_timgen_id = u8_timgen_id;
0000ba  481b              LDR      r0,|L13.296|
0000bc  eb001045          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #5
0000c0  f8004034          STRB     r4,[r0,r4,LSL #3]
;;;287        g_st_timgen[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id].b_timgen_en =  MS_ENABLE;
0000c4  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
0000c6  4918              LDR      r1,|L13.296|
0000c8  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
0000cc  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
0000d0  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
;;;288        g_st_timgen[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id].pst_timing = &g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id];
0000d2  eb050045          ADD      r0,r5,r5,LSL #1
0000d6  eb0000c5          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #3
0000da  490f              LDR      r1,|L13.280|
0000dc  eb0100c0          ADD      r0,r1,r0,LSL #3
0000e0  eb040144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #1
0000e4  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
0000e8  eb000041          ADD      r0,r0,r1,LSL #1
0000ec  490e              LDR      r1,|L13.296|
0000ee  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
0000f2  eb0101c4          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #3
0000f6  6048              STR      r0,[r1,#4]
;;;289    
;;;290        api_vds_tmg_init(&g_st_timgen[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id]);
0000f8  490b              LDR      r1,|L13.296|
0000fa  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
0000fe  eb0100c4          ADD      r0,r1,r4,LSL #3
000102  f7fffffe          BL       api_vds_tmg_init
;;;291        api_vds_tmg_config(&g_st_timgen[u8Dev][u8_timgen_id]);
000106  4908              LDR      r1,|L13.296|
000108  eb011145          ADD      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
00010c  eb0100c4          ADD      r0,r1,r4,LSL #3
000110  f7fffffe          BL       api_vds_tmg_config
;;;292    }
000114  b005              ADD      sp,sp,#0x14
000116  bd30              POP      {r4,r5,pc}
;;;293    
                          ENDP

                  |L13.280|
                          DCD      g_stVideo_HDMITx_Timing
                  |L13.284|
                          DCD      g_u8_output_index
                  |L13.288|
                          DCD      g_arrOutputTable
                  |L13.292|
                          DCD      g_u8_misc_timgen
                  |L13.296|
                          DCD      g_st_timgen

                          AREA ||i._video_tx_hdcp_process||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  _video_tx_hdcp_process PROC
;;;1551   #endif
;;;1552   static VOID _video_tx_hdcp_process(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1553   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;1554       BOOL b_hpd = FALSE;
000004  2600              MOVS     r6,#0
;;;1555       UINT8 u8_tx_id = 0;
000006  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1556       static BOOL b_hdcp_status = FALSE;
;;;1557   
;;;1558       for(u8_tx_id = 0; u8_tx_id < 4; u8_tx_id ++)
000008  bf00              NOP      
00000a  e065              B        |L14.216|
                  |L14.12|
;;;1559       {
;;;1560           if(b_hdcp_status && u8_tx_id == 0)
00000c  4834              LDR      r0,|L14.224|
00000e  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; b_hdcp_status
000010  b178              CBZ      r0,|L14.50|
000012  b974              CBNZ     r4,|L14.50|
;;;1561           {
;;;1562               if(api_hdmi_tx_hdcp14_get_status(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id]))
000014  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000018  ebc11145          RSB      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
00001c  4a31              LDR      r2,|L14.228|
00001e  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000022  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
000026  ebc21244          RSB      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
00002a  eb010082          ADD      r0,r1,r2,LSL #2
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       api_hdmi_tx_hdcp14_get_status
                  |L14.50|
;;;1563               {
;;;1564   //              LOG("[INFO] HDCP success...\r\n");
;;;1565               }
;;;1566               else
;;;1567               {
;;;1568   //              LOG("[INFO] HDCP failed...\r\n");
;;;1569               }
;;;1570           }
;;;1571   
;;;1572           b_hpd = api_hdmi_tx_get_hpd_status(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id]);
000032  eb050145          ADD      r1,r5,r5,LSL #1
000036  ebc11145          RSB      r1,r1,r5,LSL #5
00003a  4a2a              LDR      r2,|L14.228|
00003c  eb021101          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #4
000040  eb040244          ADD      r2,r4,r4,LSL #1
000044  ebc21244          RSB      r2,r2,r4,LSL #5
000048  eb010082          ADD      r0,r1,r2,LSL #2
00004c  f7fffffe          BL       api_hdmi_tx_get_hpd_status
000050  4606              MOV      r6,r0
;;;1573           if(b_hpd != b_hpd_bakes[u8Dev][u8_tx_id])
000052  4825              LDR      r0,|L14.232|
000054  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
000058  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
00005a  42b0              CMP      r0,r6
00005c  d03a              BEQ      |L14.212|
;;;1574           {
;;;1575               b_hpd_bakes[u8Dev][u8_tx_id]    = b_hpd;
00005e  4822              LDR      r0,|L14.232|
000060  eb000085          ADD      r0,r0,r5,LSL #2
000064  5506              STRB     r6,[r0,r4]
;;;1576               if(b_hpd)
000066  2e00              CMP      r6,#0
000068  d018              BEQ      |L14.156|
;;;1577               {
;;;1578                   switch(u8_tx_id)
00006a  b134              CBZ      r4,|L14.122|
00006c  2c01              CMP      r4,#1
00006e  d008              BEQ      |L14.130|
000070  2c02              CMP      r4,#2
000072  d00a              BEQ      |L14.138|
000074  2c03              CMP      r4,#3
000076  d110              BNE      |L14.154|
000078  e00b              B        |L14.146|
                  |L14.122|
;;;1579                   {
;;;1580                       case 0:
;;;1581   //                      api_hdmi_tx_hdcp14_init(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id]);
;;;1582   //                      mculib_delay_ms(200);
;;;1583   //                      api_hdmi_tx_hdcp14_enable(&g_st_hdmi_tx[u8Dev][u8_tx_id], MS_TRUE);
;;;1584   //                      b_hdcp_status = TRUE;
;;;1585                           LOG("[INFO] HDMI Tx1 connected....\r\n");
00007a  a01c              ADR      r0,|L14.236|
00007c  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
;;;1586                           break;
000080  e00b              B        |L14.154|
                  |L14.130|

00027e  f6ffaec6          BLT      |L15.14|
;;;747                    }
;;;748                }
;;;749            }
;;;750        }
;;;751    }
000282  e8bd81f0          POP      {r4-r8,pc}
;;;752    
                          ENDP

000286  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L15.648|

                          AREA ||i.ms1826_startup_timer_counter||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  ms1826_startup_timer_counter PROC
;;;957    
;;;958    void ms1826_startup_timer_counter(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  4601              MOV      r1,r0
;;;959    {
;;;960        u8 i;
;;;961    
;;;962        for(i=0;i<4;i++)
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000004  e012              B        |L16.44|
                  |L16.6|
;;;963        {
;;;964            if(g_u16Startup2InitTimer[u8Dev][i])
000006  4a0b              LDR      r2,|L16.52|
000008  eb0202c1          ADD      r2,r2,r1,LSL #3
00000c  f8322010          LDRH     r2,[r2,r0,LSL #1]
000010  b152              CBZ      r2,|L16.40|
;;;965                g_u16Startup2InitTimer[u8Dev][i]--;
000012  4a08              LDR      r2,|L16.52|
000014  eb0202c1          ADD      r2,r2,r1,LSL #3
000018  f8322010          LDRH     r2,[r2,r0,LSL #1]
00001c  1e52              SUBS     r2,r2,#1
00001e  4b05              LDR      r3,|L16.52|
000020  eb0303c1          ADD      r3,r3,r1,LSL #3
000024  f8232010          STRH     r2,[r3,r0,LSL #1]
                  |L16.40|
000028  1c42              ADDS     r2,r0,#1              ;962
00002a  b2d0              UXTB     r0,r2                 ;962
                  |L16.44|
00002c  2804              CMP      r0,#4                 ;962
00002e  dbea              BLT      |L16.6|
;;;966        }
;;;967    }
000030  4770              BX       lr
;;;968    #if 1 //new
                          ENDP

000032  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L16.52|
                          DCD      g_u16Startup2InitTimer

                          AREA ||i.osd_service||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  osd_service PROC
;;;1645   
;;;1646   VOID osd_service(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1647   {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;1648       UINT8 u8_osd_time;
;;;1649   
;;;1650       if(g_u8_time == 0)
000004  481a              LDR      r0,|L17.112|
000006  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_u8_time
000008  b908              CBNZ     r0,|L17.14|
;;;1651           u8_osd_time =10;
00000a  250a              MOVS     r5,#0xa
00000c  e010              B        |L17.48|
                  |L17.14|
;;;1652       else if(g_u8_time == 1)
00000e  4818              LDR      r0,|L17.112|
000010  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_u8_time
000012  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000014  d101              BNE      |L17.26|
;;;1653           u8_osd_time =30;
000016  251e              MOVS     r5,#0x1e
000018  e00a              B        |L17.48|
                  |L17.26|
;;;1654       else if(g_u8_time == 2)
00001a  4815              LDR      r0,|L17.112|
00001c  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_u8_time
00001e  2802              CMP      r0,#2
000020  d101              BNE      |L17.38|
;;;1655           u8_osd_time =60;
000022  253c              MOVS     r5,#0x3c
000024  e004              B        |L17.48|
                  |L17.38|
;;;1656       else if(g_u8_time == 3)
000026  4812              LDR      r0,|L17.112|
000028  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]  ; g_u8_time
00002a  2803              CMP      r0,#3
00002c  d100              BNE      |L17.48|
                  |L17.46|
;;;1657           return;
;;;1658   
;;;1659       if (!g_bOSDShown[u8Dev] && !b_osd_menu)
;;;1660       {
;;;1661           g_u8OSDCount[u8Dev] = 0;
;;;1662           return;
;;;1663       }
;;;1664   
;;;1665       g_u8OSDCount[u8Dev] ++;
;;;1666   
;;;1667       if (g_u8OSDCount[u8Dev] > u8_osd_time) // count every 500ms
;;;1668       {
;;;1669           g_u8OSDCount[u8Dev] = 0;
;;;1670           sys_show_osd(u8Dev, FALSE, 0x0F);
;;;1671           g_bOSDShown[u8Dev] = FALSE;
;;;1672       }
;;;1673   }
00002e  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
                  |L17.48|
000030  4810              LDR      r0,|L17.116|
000032  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]            ;1659
000034  b930              CBNZ     r0,|L17.68|
000036  4810              LDR      r0,|L17.120|
000038  7800              LDRB     r0,[r0,#0]            ;1659  ; b_osd_menu
00003a  b918              CBNZ     r0,|L17.68|
00003c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1661
00003e  490f              LDR      r1,|L17.124|
000040  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]            ;1661
000042  e7f4              B        |L17.46|
                  |L17.68|
000044  480d              LDR      r0,|L17.124|
000046  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]            ;1665
000048  1c40              ADDS     r0,r0,#1              ;1665
00004a  490c              LDR      r1,|L17.124|
00004c  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]            ;1665
00004e  4608              MOV      r0,r1                 ;1667
000050  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]            ;1667
000052  42a8              CMP      r0,r5                 ;1667
000054  dd09              BLE      |L17.106|
000056  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1669
000058  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]            ;1669
00005a  220f              MOVS     r2,#0xf               ;1670
00005c  2100              MOVS     r1,#0                 ;1670
00005e  4620              MOV      r0,r4                 ;1670
000060  f7fffffe          BL       sys_show_osd
000064  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;1671
000066  4903              LDR      r1,|L17.116|
000068  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]            ;1671
                  |L17.106|
00006a  bf00              NOP      
00006c  e7df              B        |L17.46|
;;;1674   
                          ENDP

00006e  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L17.112|
                          DCD      g_u8_time
                  |L17.116|
                          DCD      g_bOSDShown
                  |L17.120|
                          DCD      b_osd_menu
                  |L17.124|
                          DCD      g_u8OSDCount

                          AREA ||i.video_process||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  video_process PROC
;;;1620   
;;;1621   VOID video_process(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b570              PUSH     {r4-r6,lr}
;;;1622   {
000002  4605              MOV      r5,r0
;;;1623       UINT8 u8_rx_idx = 0;
000004  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
;;;1624   //  static UINT8 u8_rx_idx = 0;
;;;1625   
;;;1626       _video_tx_process(u8Dev);
000006  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000008  f7fffffe          BL       _video_tx_process
;;;1627       _video_tx_hdcp_process(u8Dev);
00000c  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00000e  f7fffffe          BL       _video_tx_hdcp_process
;;;1628   
;;;1629   #if 0
;;;1630       _video_rx_process(u8_rx_idx);
;;;1631   
;;;1632       u8_rx_idx ++;
;;;1633       if(u8_rx_idx >= 4)
;;;1634           u8_rx_idx = 0;
;;;1635   #endif
;;;1636   
;;;1637       for(u8_rx_idx = 0; u8_rx_idx < 4; u8_rx_idx++)
000012  bf00              NOP      
000014  e00e              B        |L18.52|
                  |L18.22|
;;;1638       {
;;;1639           if(g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev]==MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT)
000016  4809              LDR      r0,|L18.60|
000018  5d40              LDRB     r0,[r0,r5]
00001a  2804              CMP      r0,#4
00001c  d104              BNE      |L18.40|
;;;1640               _video_rx_process_out(u8Dev,u8_rx_idx);
00001e  4621              MOV      r1,r4
000020  4628              MOV      r0,r5
000022  f7fffffe          BL       _video_rx_process_out
000026  e003              B        |L18.48|
                  |L18.40|
;;;1641           else
;;;1642               _video_rx_process(u8Dev,u8_rx_idx);
000028  4621              MOV      r1,r4
00002a  4628              MOV      r0,r5
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       _video_rx_process
                  |L18.48|
000030  1c60              ADDS     r0,r4,#1              ;1637
000032  b2c4              UXTB     r4,r0                 ;1637
                  |L18.52|
000034  2c04              CMP      r4,#4                 ;1637
000036  dbee              BLT      |L18.22|
;;;1643       }
;;;1644   }
000038  bd70              POP      {r4-r6,pc}
;;;1645   
                          ENDP

00003a  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L18.60|
                          DCD      g_u8_display_mode

                          AREA ||i.video_process_cfg||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  video_process_cfg PROC
;;;534    
;;;535    VOID video_process_cfg(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;536    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;537        _ms1826_init(u8Dev);
000004  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000006  f7fffffe          BL       _ms1826_init
;;;538        _video_port_hdmi_rx_init(u8Dev);
00000a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00000c  f7fffffe          BL       _video_port_hdmi_rx_init
;;;539        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_1);
000010  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000012  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000014  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;540        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_2);
000018  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
00001a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00001c  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;541        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_3);
000020  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000024  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;542        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_4);
000028  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
00002a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00002c  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;543    	mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(gu8ChipAddr[u8Dev],0x34,0x0f);	//ąŘ±Ő4Â·timgen
000030  490d              LDR      r1,|L19.104|
000032  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
000034  220f              MOVS     r2,#0xf
000036  2134              MOVS     r1,#0x34
000038  f7fffffe          BL       mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval
;;;544    	mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(gu8ChipAddr[u8Dev],0x34,0xff);	//´ňżŞ4Â·timg
00003c  490a              LDR      r1,|L19.104|
00003e  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
000040  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000042  2134              MOVS     r1,#0x34
000044  f7fffffe          BL       mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval
;;;545        app_osd_init(u8Dev);
000048  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       app_osd_init
;;;546        g_bOSDShown[u8Dev] = MS_TRUE;
00004e  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
000050  4906              LDR      r1,|L19.108|
000052  5508              STRB     r0,[r1,r4]
;;;547        sys_show_osd(u8Dev,g_bOSDShown[u8Dev], 0x0F);
000054  4608              MOV      r0,r1
000056  5d01              LDRB     r1,[r0,r4]
000058  220f              MOVS     r2,#0xf
00005a  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00005c  f7fffffe          BL       sys_show_osd
;;;548        _video_port_hdmi_tx_init(u8Dev);
000060  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000062  f7fffffe          BL       _video_port_hdmi_tx_init
;;;549    }
000066  bd10              POP      {r4,pc}
;;;550    
                          ENDP

                  |L19.104|
                          DCD      gu8ChipAddr
                  |L19.108|
                          DCD      g_bOSDShown

                          AREA ||i.video_process_init||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  video_process_init PROC
;;;473    
;;;474    VOID video_process_init(UINT8 u8Dev)
000000  b510              PUSH     {r4,lr}
;;;475    {
000002  4604              MOV      r4,r0
;;;476        b_hpd_bak[u8Dev][0] = FALSE;
000004  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000006  4962              LDR      r1,|L20.400|
000008  f8010024          STRB     r0,[r1,r4,LSL #2]
;;;477        b_hpd_bak[u8Dev][1] = FALSE;
00000c  eb010184          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #2
000010  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
;;;478        b_hpd_bak[u8Dev][2] = FALSE;
000012  495f              LDR      r1,|L20.400|
000014  eb010184          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #2
000018  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;479        b_hpd_bak[u8Dev][3] = FALSE;
00001a  495d              LDR      r1,|L20.400|
00001c  eb010184          ADD      r1,r1,r4,LSL #2
000020  70c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#3]
;;;480        _ms1826_init(u8Dev);
000022  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000024  f7fffffe          BL       _ms1826_init
;;;481        _video_port_hdmi_rx_init(u8Dev);
000028  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00002a  f7fffffe          BL       _video_port_hdmi_rx_init
;;;482        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_1);
00002e  2100              MOVS     r1,#0
000030  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000032  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;483        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_2);
000036  2101              MOVS     r1,#1
000038  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00003a  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;484        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_3);
00003e  2102              MOVS     r1,#2
000040  4620              MOV      r0,r4
000042  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;485        _video_timgen_cfg(u8Dev,TIMGEN_4);
000046  2103              MOVS     r1,#3
000048  4620              MOV      r0,r4
00004a  f7fffffe          BL       _video_timgen_cfg
;;;486    //	mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(0xb6,0x34,0x0f);	//ąŘ±Ő4Â·timgen
;;;487    //	mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(0xb6,0x34,0xff);	//´ňżŞ4Â·timgen
;;;488        mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(gu8ChipAddr[u8Dev],0x34,0x0f);   //ąŘ±Ő4Â·timgen
00004e  4951              LDR      r1,|L20.404|
000050  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
000052  220f              MOVS     r2,#0xf
000054  2134              MOVS     r1,#0x34
000056  f7fffffe          BL       mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval
;;;489        mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval(gu8ChipAddr[u8Dev],0x34,0xff);   //´ňżŞ4Â·timgen
00005a  494e              LDR      r1,|L20.404|
00005c  5d08              LDRB     r0,[r1,r4]
00005e  22ff              MOVS     r2,#0xff
000060  2134              MOVS     r1,#0x34
000062  f7fffffe          BL       mculib_i2c_write_16bidx8bval
;;;490        g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev].u8_dst_sel = 0;
000066  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000068  eb041144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #5
00006c  4a4a              LDR      r2,|L20.408|
00006e  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
000072  7048              STRB     r0,[r1,#1]
;;;491        g_st_app_splitter_dev[u8Dev].b_splitter_sw  = MS_FALSE;
000074  eb041144          ADD      r1,r4,r4,LSL #5
000078  eb020181          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #2
00007c  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;492        gst_splicer_app_dev[u8Dev].b_splicer_sw = MS_FALSE;
00007e  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
000082  4a46              LDR      r2,|L20.412|
000084  eb0201c1          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #3
000088  7088              STRB     r0,[r1,#2]
;;;493        gst_splicer_app_dev[u8Dev].u8_tx_mirror = MS_FALSE;
00008a  ebc401c4          RSB      r1,r4,r4,LSL #3
00008e  eb0201c1          ADD      r1,r2,r1,LSL #3
000092  70c8              STRB     r0,[r1,#3]
;;;494        switch(g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev])
000094  4842              LDR      r0,|L20.416|
000096  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
000098  2805              CMP      r0,#5
00009a  d253              BCS      |L20.324|
00009c  e8dff000          TBB      [pc,r0]
0000a0  2733033f          DCB      0x27,0x33,0x03,0x3f
0000a4  0400              DCB      0x04,0x00
;;;495        {
;;;496            case MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER:
;;;497            case MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT:
0000a6  bf00              NOP      
;;;498                app_single_mode_config(u8Dev);
0000a8  4620              MOV      r0,r4
0000aa  f7fffffe          BL       app_single_mode_config
;;;499                if(g_u8_display_mode[u8Dev] == MS1826_SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER)
0000ae  483c              LDR      r0,|L20.416|
0000b0  5d00              LDRB     r0,[r0,r4]
0000b2  2802              CMP      r0,#2
0000b4  d103              BNE      |L20.190|
;;;500                    LOG("[INFO] MS1826 function is SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER.\r\n");
0000b6  a03b              ADR      r0,|L20.420|
0000b8  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
0000bc  e002              B        |L20.196|
                  |L20.190|
;;;501                else
;;;502                    LOG("[INFO] MS1826 function is SEAMLESS_MATRIX_SWITCHER_OUT.\r\n");
0000be  a047              ADR      r0,|L20.476|
0000c0  f7fffffe          BL       ms1826_printf
                  |L20.196|
;;;503    
;;;504                app_single_mode_rx_switch(u8Dev,0, 0);

;;;525        _video_mute(u8Dev,HDMI_RX_A, MS_TRUE);
